3128860.name: Beff Jezos Simulator: Demo
3128860.description:
OFFICE MANAGEMENT

Make your office beautiful and efficient. Place your products easily accessible and design a seamless experience for your orders.

SUPPLY GOODS

Order items using the in-game computer. Place the goods on the shelves, organize them in your office and put them on sale in your online store.

ON SALE

Set profits for the product and ensure customer reviews remain positive.

SHIPPED

Ship the purchased products and deliver them to the cargo vehicle to reach the customers.

DEMO

Contents such as hiring workers, new computers, opening new shops and warehouses are not available in this demo. If you like this demo, which focuses on the extensive gameplay of the game's ordering and shipping mechanics and includes store arrangements, you can add it to your wish list.
3128860.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 简体中文, 荷兰语, 日语, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 土耳其语
